description_long: This is a plush, pastel green stuffed toy shaped like a whimsical animal, likely a unicorn, with a rounded body and short limbs. It features a small, rounded snout, two black dot eyes, and faint pink blush spots on its cheeks. The toy has a multicolored party hat on its head, with a blue base and a pink tip, and a small, brown, irregularly shaped object at the top. Along its back are three soft, rounded protrusions in yellow, purple, and white, resembling a mane or decorative elements. The belly and lower face are white, and the toy's overall texture appears soft and slightly fuzzy, typical of plush toys. The toy exudes a playful and friendly appearance, making it suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban parks or play areas.
description: A pastel green plush unicorn-like stuffed toy with a party hat, rounded body, and colorful mane details. It has a soft, fuzzy texture and a friendly, whimsical appearance.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the face, party hat, and colorful mane details, with the rounded belly and both arms visible.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the snout, party hat, and the right side of the body, with the mane and tail partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the full mane, and the rounded back, with minimal facial features visible.
description_view_3: Left side view emphasizing the profile of the face, party hat, and the colorful mane, with the left arm and leg visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with small black dot eyes and faint pink blush spots on the cheeks. There is no visible mouth or eyebrows.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is in a sitting posture with its limbs slightly spread and its head upright, giving it a relaxed and approachable appearance.
